completed_games.title: A Way Out
completed_games.notes: First co-op only game we tried. Weird twist but hilarious moments.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Betraying each other at the end for the lulz.

completed_games.title: CORPSE FACTORY
completed_games.notes: Interesting plot with good English voice acting.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Alex losing his breath reciting a paragraphs upon paragraphs of weirdly erotic text inside a bathroom.

completed_games.title: The Unholy War
completed_games.notes: Somehow we both independently knew about this game and 'introduced' each other to it.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Being stuck in an hours long strategy game and Josh turning off the PlayStation 2 so he could leave.

completed_games.title: It Takes Two
completed_games.notes: A game about the woes of marriage.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Trolling each other with the switch mechanics.

completed_games.title: Alien Swarm: Reactive Drop
completed_games.notes: Designed for 4 player co-op, but we made do.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Completing the hardest levels, at highest difficulty, with us each controlling two characters at the same time.

completed_games.title: FlyKnight
completed_games.notes: Darksouls, but if you were a Fly...Knight.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Immediately killing the people who randomly joined our live online game.

completed_games.title: Remnant: From the Ashes
completed_games.notes: A random buy that which ending up being a great bro-op.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Locking in and obliterating Ixillis... after getting destroyed by him run after run.

completed_games.title: Devil May Cry 3: Dante's Awakening
completed_games.notes: Doppelganger Style: How to co-op a DMC game.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Non-stop Nevan spamming as the invulnerable doppelganger.

completed_games.title: Blue Prince
completed_games.notes: One of the best puzzle games we've ever played. Wouldn't have finished it without both of us together.

completed_games.title: V Rising
completed_games.notes: Bosses are materially more difficult when played with more than 1 player, designed instead for 4 players. We did this with only us two.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Finally beating Dracula on Brutal co-op after around 100 runs.

completed_games.title: Serial Lover
completed_games.notes: It's a dating sim rhythm game about seducing serial killers. What more needs to be said? Unfortunately, it's not a hentai game.
completed_games.favorite_memory: Somehow completing Jenny's tracks on Insane. Also, seducing God.

to_play_games.title: Slay The Spire 2
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Great deck-building game similar to others we liked, plus they added co-op.
to_play_games.notes: Very light 'roguelite' upgrades.

to_play_games.title: REMNANT II
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Need to finish the fight and officialy complete the game.
to_play_games.notes: Paused due to us getting burnt out from the main campaign's final boss.

to_play_games.title: For The King II
to_play_games.reason_to_play: First game was great, hoping the sequel is a continuation.
to_play_games.notes: Four characters this time instead of three.

to_play_games.title: Split Fiction
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Another fun looking co-op platformer.
to_play_games.notes: The third co-op only game from Hazelight Studios.

to_play_games.title: Age of Mythology: Retold
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Continue and finish that co-op mission map.
to_play_games.notes: First true RTS bro-op.

to_play_games.title: Amnesia: The Bunker
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Need to Bro Up and beat this.
to_play_games.notes: AI horror creature learns from your play. Makes speed a necessity.

to_play_games.title: Baldur's Gate 3
to_play_games.notes: There's a Sex% category for speedrunning this game.

to_play_games.title: Borderlands 2
to_play_games.notes: No crazy character creation this time.

to_play_games.title: Borderlands 3
to_play_games.notes: Supposedly the best of the 5 main games.

to_play_games.title: Crash Bandicoot 4: It's About Time
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Continue the tradition of raging at Crash games.
to_play_games.notes: Without a doubt, the hardest of the 4 main games.

to_play_games.title: Cuphead
to_play_games.reason_to_play: The bro challenge. Nothing can be as hard as Dracula... right?
to_play_games.notes: Expect to rage and need breaks.

to_play_games.title: Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Another bro-mystery-op.
to_play_games.notes: Mostly voice acted.

to_play_games.title: Danganronpa V3: Killing Harmony
to_play_games.notes: Despite its looks, it's not a waifu collection simulator.

to_play_games.title: Date Everything!
to_play_games.reason_to_play: I mean... for the lulz.
to_play_games.notes: Alcohol is required to run this game.

to_play_games.title: Dead Island 2
to_play_games.notes: Vermintide... but with zombies.

to_play_games.title: Demonologist
to_play_games.notes: It's another Phasmophobia-style game. But hey, at least it's finished.

to_play_games.title: Destiny 2
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Nearly a decade later, while a mostly dead MMO, it'd be fun for a campaign sprint.
to_play_games.notes: Halo died for this game.

to_play_games.title: Diablo II: Resurrected - Infernal Edition
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Relive the classic as a bro-op.
to_play_games.notes: Complete graphical overhaul. Looks very modern.

to_play_games.title: Diablo IV
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Finish the tetralogy of games.
to_play_games.notes: Microtransactions...

to_play_games.title: Dispatch
to_play_games.reason_to_play: I mean, Blonde Blazer...
to_play_games.notes: MoistCr1TiKaL is the voice actor for Sonar.

to_play_games.title: Dying Light 2 Stay Human: Reloaded Edition
ENDLESS™ Dungeon - Definitive Edition
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Bro-op tower defense is always great fun.
to_play_games.notes: Roguelite with tower defense.

to_play_games.title: Enshrouded
to_play_games.notes: Will still probably release before Valheim.

to_play_games.title: Call of the Sea
to_play_games.notes: Lovecraftian puzzle game, but without the more adult themes.

to_play_games.title: Grim Dawn - Fangs of Asterkarn
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Finish the last DLC and maybe some new classes.

to_play_games.title: HITMAN World of Assassination
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Rare that there are stealth assassination co-op games.
to_play_games.notes: There is a specific co-op mode being added. Unknown what missions will be available.

to_play_games.title: Little Fighter 2 Remastered
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Relive the old middle school game.
to_play_games.notes: Used to play this with 2 - 4 people all on one keyboard.

to_play_games.title: No one lives under the lighthouse Director's cut
Orcs Must Die! Deathtrap
to_play_games.notes: They limited the amount of barricades you can build. Why?

to_play_games.title: PARANORMASIGHT: The Seven Mysteries of Honjo
The Lord of the Rings: Return to Moria
The Roottrees are Dead
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Recommended by AI!

to_play_games.title: Titan Quest II
to_play_games.notes: Currently still in Early Access.

to_play_games.title: Valheim
to_play_games.reason_to_play: We kind of have to play this at this point just to say it's done.
to_play_games.notes: We've both gone through multiple life changing events while this game has been in EA for far too many years. Still waiting for its release.

to_play_games.title: Voices of the Void
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Reads as a really interesting simulation game with some... occult themes.
to_play_games.notes: Blind recommendation.

to_play_games.title: Voidtrain
to_play_games.reason_to_play: A relatively short Survival game compared to their normal length.
to_play_games.notes: Hear me out...

to_play_games.title: La-Mulana
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Because we enjoy extremely obtuse and frustrating puzzles.
to_play_games.notes: Described as cryptic from nearly every source. Expect a lot of mental power required.

to_play_games.title: La-Mulana 2
to_play_games.reason_to_play: More frustration = more fun?
to_play_games.notes: Described as better but still just as demanding and frustrating as the first game.
